person.name: Lord Landolf Van Roccasecca Van Aquino 1

nameForms.fullText: Lord Landolf Van Roccasecca Van Aquino 1

parent.name: Aymon Van Aquino Heer Van Roccasecca

sibling.name: Lord Landolf Van Roccasecca Van Aquino 1

km.Kingdom of Naples: រេហ្គណូ ឌី ណាប៉ូលី

zh.Kingdom of Naples: 勒尼 迪 拿坡里
zh.lifeSummary: Lord Landolf Van Roccasecca Van Aquino 1是Aymon Van Aquino Heer Van Roccasecca的兒子，於1170年出生。他於0122年與Theodora Hauteville結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1245年享年75歲。

zh-hans.Kingdom of Naples: 勒尼 迪 拿坡里
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lord Landolf Van Roccasecca Van Aquino 1是Aymon Van Aquino Heer Van Roccasecca的儿子，于1170年出生。他于0122年与Theodora Hauteville结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1245年享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Aquino
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Antonio, Pedro, Juan, Manuel, Mario, Ana, Jesus, Jorge, Josefina, Julio, Luis.  Portuguese Paulo, Catarina, Joao.  Italian Romeo, Luigi, Salvatore, Clemente, Leonardo.

Italian, Spanish, and Portuguese: from a Christian personal name bestowed in honor of Saint Thomas Aquinas (1225–74; Tommaso d'Aquino in Italian, Tomás de Aquino in Spanish), an Italian Dominican friar and Doctor of the Church. This surname is also common in the Philippines. See also 2 below, compare De Aquino .
Italian: habitational name from a place called Aquino (see   D'Aquino  ), the place where the theologian (see 1 above) was born.

variants.name: De Aquino
meanings: Spanish and Portuguese (Brazil): variant of Aquino , a Christian personal name referring to Saint Thomas Aquinas (Tomás de Aquino in Spanish), with the preposition de ‘from, of’.

variants.name: D'Aquino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Nicola, Stefano, Gaetano, Margherita, Nunzio, Sal, Salvatore.  Spanish Alba, Jose Alejandro, Pedro, Socorro.

Italian: habitational name for someone from a place called Aquino, of which there are several examples in Italy, but in particular the one in Lazio, birthplace of Saint Thomas Aquinas (see   Aquino  ).

variants.name: Aguino
meanings: Hispanic: habitational name from a place called Aguino in Oviedo (Asturias), or an altered form of Spanish   Aquino  . This surname is common among Native Americans (Pueblos) in NM. It is also found in the Philippines.

nameMeanings.name: Landolf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman given name, Old Norse Rannulfr, derived from rand ‘rim, shield’ (or hrafn ‘raven’) + úlfr ‘wolf’.

variants.name: Randulf
meanings: From a Norman given name, Old Norse Rannulfr, derived from rand ‘rim, shield’ (or hrafn ‘raven’) + úlfr ‘wolf’.

variants.name: Randolph
meanings: From a Norman given name, Old Norse Rannulfr, derived from rand ‘rim, shield’ (or hrafn ‘raven’) + úlfr ‘wolf’.

en.lifeSummary: Lord Landolf Van Roccasecca Van Aquino 1 was born in 1170 as the son of Aymon Van Aquino Heer Van Roccasecca. He married Theodora Hauteville in 0122. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1245, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lord Landolf Van Roccasecca Van Aquino 1 est né en 1170, fils de Aymon Van Aquino Heer Van Roccasecca. Il a épousé Theodora Hauteville en 0122. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1245, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Lord Landolf Van Roccasecca Van Aquino 1 wurde 1170, als Sohn von Aymon Van Aquino Heer Van Roccasecca geboren. Er hat 0122 Theodora Hauteville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1245 im Alter von 75 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Lord Landolf Van Roccasecca Van Aquino 1 è nato il nel 1170 come figlio di Aymon Van Aquino Heer Van Roccasecca. Lui sposato Theodora Hauteville nel 0122. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1245, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.Kingdom of Naples: レグノ ジー ナポリ
ja.lifeSummary: Lord Landolf Van Roccasecca Van Aquino 1は1170年にAymon Van Aquino Heer Van Roccaseccaの息子として生まれた。0122年にTheodora Hautevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1245年に75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Landolf Van Roccasecca Van Aquino 1(은)는 1170년 Aymon Van Aquino Heer Van Roccasecca의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 0122년 Theodora Hauteville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1245년 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lord Landolf Van Roccasecca Van Aquino 1 nasceu em 1170 filho de Aymon Van Aquino Heer Van Roccasecca. Ele casou-se com Theodora Hauteville em 0122. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1245, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Lord Landolf Van Roccasecca Van Aquino 1 родился в 1170 г. Его отца звали Aymon Van Aquino Heer Van Roccasecca. Он женился на женщине по имени Theodora Hauteville в 0122 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1245 г. в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Lord Landolf Van Roccasecca Van Aquino 1 nació en 1170 como hijo de Aymon Van Aquino Heer Van Roccasecca. Se casó con Theodora Hauteville en 0122. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1245, a la edad de 75 años.

th.1203–Female: ปี1203–ถึงแก่กรรม
th.Kingdom of Naples: เรกโน ดี นาพลิ
